item.title: 苹果推送 iOS 26.5 Beta 2，地图广告加速落地
item.guid: 苹果推送-iOS-26.5-Beta-2，地图广告加速落地
item.description:
According to Apple Insider, Apple's iOS 26.5 developer beta Beta 2, released yesterday, added a pop-up notification about an upcoming advertising feature in the built-in Maps app, marking another step forward in the official rollout of Maps ads. 据 Apple Insider 报道，苹果昨日发布的 iOS 26.5 开发者测试版 Beta 2 中，自带地图 App 新增了一个关于即将推出广告功能的弹窗提示，标志着地图广告正式落地的进程又向前迈进了一步。

Maps may display local ads based on your approximate location, current search terms, or the map view at the time of search. To protect your privacy, ad information will not be associated with your Apple account.

Furthermore, ads cannot access the "Visited Locations" feature, and Apple will not share any related location data with advertisers. 此外，广告无法访问「已访问地点」功能，苹果也不会与广告商共享任何相关位置数据。

Currently, this pop-up does not offer an option to opt out of ads. According to public information, after ads officially launch, they will appear in two locations: at the top of search results, and within the new "Recommended Places" feature – the latter has already appeared in iOS 26.5 Beta 1, where clicking the search bar brings up business recommendations. 目前该弹窗并不提供退出广告的选项。根据公开信息，广告正式上线后将出现在两个位置：搜索结果顶部，以及新增的「推荐地点」功能中——后者在 iOS 26.5 Beta 1 中已经出现，点击搜索栏时会弹出商家推荐。

Ads will be clearly labeled and displayed based on relevance, allowing users to directly make calls, navigate, or place orders through them. 广告将被明确标注，并基于相关性进行展示，用户可直接通过广告拨打电话、导航前往或下单。

item.title: 荣耀否认与字节跳动接洽「豆包手机」合作
item.guid: 荣耀否认与字节跳动接洽「豆包手机」合作
item.description:
Yesterday, it was reported that Honor was in talks with ByteDance regarding cooperation on a "Doubao phone," but Honor later denied it. 昨天有报道称，荣耀正与字节跳动就「豆包手机」相关合作展开接洽，但后续荣耀方面予以否认。

According to Jiemian News, Honor responded that, after internal confirmation, the relevant rumors are not true. 据界面新闻报道，荣耀回应称，经内部确认，相关传闻并不属实。

Honor is always committed to providing high-quality products to consumers through technological innovation. Should there be any progress in strategic cooperation, we will inform everyone through official channels as soon as possible.

According to a source cited by Blue Whale News, before ByteDance collaborated with ZTE to launch the first-generation Doubao phone, the earliest mobile phone manufacturer it contacted was actually Honor. 蓝鲸新闻援引知情人士透露，字节跳动在与中兴通讯合作推出第一代豆包手机之前，最早接触的手机厂商其实是荣耀。

At that time, Honor was relatively cautious, believing that such deep system-level cooperation carried certain risks: while the Doubao phone, as an exploratory engineering device, could adopt a more aggressive technical route, Honor has a user base of hundreds of millions. If new services were to encounter issues in stability, compatibility, or security, it could very likely trigger widespread functional anomalies and user complaints. 彼时荣耀态度较为谨慎，认为此类深度系统级合作存在一定风险：豆包手机作为探索性工程机技术路线可以更为激进，但荣耀拥有亿级用户体量，一旦新服务在稳定性、兼容性或安全性上出现问题，极有可能引发大规模功能异常与用户投诉。

An insider stated: "For mainstream mobile phone manufacturers, the advancement of AI phones can only be gradual, not a one-step process." 知情人士表示：「对于主流手机厂商来说，AI 手机的推进只能循序渐进，无法一步到位。」

According to blogger "Digital Chat Station," vivo is also currently in talks with Doubao. 另据博主「数码闲聊站」消息，vivo 目前也在接洽豆包中。

item.title: OpenAI 伦敦「新家」定档：首个永久办公室明年见
item.guid: OpenAI-伦敦「新家」定档：首个永久办公室明年见
item.description:
On April 13, OpenAI announced it would establish its first permanent office space in London, expected to officially open in 2027, thereby creating its largest research hub outside the United States. 4 月 13 日，OpenAI 宣布将在伦敦设立首个永久性办公场地，预计于 2027 年正式启用，以此打造其在美国以外的最大研究枢纽。

According to Reuters, the new office will be located in the Regent Quarter of London's King's Cross area, specifically spanning two buildings: Jahn Court and Brassworks. 据路透社报道，新办公室选址于伦敦国王十字（King’s Cross）地区的 Regent Quarter，具体横跨 Jahn Court 与 Brassworks 两栋大楼。

Official data shows that the site is planned to accommodate up to 544 team members, aiming to meet the growing business demands in the UK and European markets. 官方数据显示，该场地规划最高可容纳 544 名团队成员，旨在应对英国及欧洲市场日益增长的业务需求。

Currently, OpenAI employs approximately 200 staff in the London area, with business functions covering foundational model research, engineering development, customer support, public policy, and regional sales. 目前，OpenAI 在伦敦地区已雇佣约 200 名员工，业务职能涵盖底层模型研究、工程开发、客户支持、公共政策以及区域销售。

item.title: OpenAI 内部备忘录：微软「限制了我们触达客户」
item.guid: OpenAI-内部备忘录：微软「限制了我们触达客户」
item.description:
According to CNBC, OpenAI Chief Revenue Officer Denise Dresser sent an internal memo to all employees this Sunday local time, openly supporting the company's strategic partnership with Amazon and stating that the long-term relationship with Microsoft "limits our ability to reach enterprise customers." 据 CNBC 报道，OpenAI 首席营收官 Denise Dresser 于当地时间本周日向全体员工发送了一份内部备忘录，公开力挺公司与亚马逊的战略合作，并直言与微软的长期合作关系「限制了我们触达企业客户的能力」。

This memo comes less than two months after Amazon announced an investment of up to $50 billion in OpenAI and the establishment of a strategic partnership. 这份备忘录距亚马逊宣布向 OpenAI 投资最高 500 亿美元、建立战略合作伙伴关系不足两个月。

Our partnership with Microsoft is the cornerstone of our success. However, it also limits our engagement with enterprise customers – for many businesses, their home is Bedrock.

Amazon Web Services (AWS)'s Bedrock platform allows enterprises to access various mainstream AI models, including OpenAI. 亚马逊云服务 AWS 旗下的 Bedrock 平台，允许企业接入包括 OpenAI 在内的各主流 AI 模型。

Since 2019, Microsoft has cumulatively invested over $13 billion in OpenAI, making it its earliest and largest external supporter. 自 2019 年起，微软已累计向 OpenAI 投资逾 130 亿美元，是其最早也是最大的外部支持者。

However, the relationship between the two parties has shown cracks in recent years—Microsoft listed OpenAI as a competitor in its 2024 annual report and began publicly testing its self-developed AI models; OpenAI, meanwhile, continues to turn to other cloud service providers such as CoreWeave, Google, and Oracle to obtain computing resources. 然而双方关系近年来已出现裂痕——微软于 2024 年中将 OpenAI 列入年报竞争对手名单，并开始公开测试自研 AI 模型；OpenAI 则持续转向 CoreWeave、Google、甲骨文等其他云服务商以获取算力资源。

Dresser also launched a direct attack on Anthropic in the memo. Dresser 还在备忘录中对 Anthropic 发起了正面攻势。

She claimed that Anthropic's annualized revenue announced this year has exceeded $30 billion, but approximately $8 billion of it is 'falsely reported'. 她声称 Anthropic 今年公布的年化营收已超过 300 亿美元，但其中约 80 亿美元存在「虚报」。

They adopted accounting methods that make revenue appear larger than it actually is, including counting the total revenue share with Amazon and Google.

Dresser also pointed out that Anthropic's 'failure to acquire sufficient computing power' was a strategic misstep. Earlier this month, Anthropic reached an agreement with Google and Broadcom to obtain 'several gigawatts' of computing power support. Dresser 还指出 Anthropic「未能获取足够算力」是一项战略失误。Anthropic 本月早些时候已与 Google 和博通达成协议，将获得「数吉瓦」级别的算力支持。

item.title: 科大讯飞回应员工中千万彩票离职传言
item.guid: 科大讯飞回应员工中千万彩票离职传言
item.description:
Recently, news that 'an iFlytek employee resigned on the spot after winning a 15 million yuan lottery' has spread across multiple social platforms. The related topic topped Weibo's hot search, and the rumored winning amount varied, with figures from 10 million to 15 million circulating. 近期，一则「科大讯飞员工中 1500 万彩票后当场离职」的消息在多个社交平台发酵，相关话题登顶微博热搜，网传中奖金额说法不一，从 1000 万到 1500 万均有流传。

Yesterday, iFlytek issued a statement in response. 昨天，科大讯飞发文回应。

We have noted the online rumors regarding our company's employee winning the lottery. If a colleague is truly that lucky, we are genuinely happy for them. More than luck, which is hard to come by, we care more about providing every partner with 'tangible and accessible' guarantees: a competitive salary, a space for continuous growth, and a set of reassuring welfare support. We believe good things will always happen!

item.title: 山姆·奥特曼住所再遭袭击，首次袭击未满两天
item.guid: 山姆·奥特曼住所再遭袭击，首次袭击未满两天
item.description:
According to the San Francisco Standard, in the early hours of April 12, local time, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's residence in San Francisco's Russian Hill was attacked again, just about 45 hours and 45 minutes after the first Molotov cocktail attack. A car stopped in front of the residence, and people inside fired shots at it; no one was injured. 据《旧金山标准报》报道，当地时间 4 月 12 日凌晨，OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥特曼位于旧金山俄罗斯山的住所再遭袭击，距首次燃烧瓶袭击仅过去约 45 小时 45 分钟。一辆轿车停在住宅门前，车内人员向其开枪，无人受伤。

The San Francisco Police Department announced that two suspects have been arrested: 25-year-old Amanda Tom and 23-year-old Muhamad Tarik Hussein, both arrested on charges of 'negligent discharge of a firearm'. 旧金山警察局宣布，已逮捕两名嫌疑人：25 岁的阿曼达·汤姆（Amanda Tom）和 23 岁的穆罕默德·塔里克·侯赛因（Muhamad Tarik Hussein），两人均以「疏忽开枪」罪名被捕。

The first attack occurred at 3:45 AM on April 10, when a 20-year-old man threw a Molotov cocktail at the metal gate on the Chestnut Street side of the residence. Security personnel quickly extinguished the fire, and no one was injured. 首次袭击发生在 4 月 10 日凌晨 3 时 45 分，一名 20 岁男子向住宅切斯纳特街一侧的金属大门投掷燃烧瓶，安保人员随即扑灭了火势，无人受伤。

After the first attack, Altman posted on social media platform X, attaching photos of his child and boyfriend. He wrote, 'Fear and anxiety about AI are justified, we are witnessing the largest transformation in human society ever,' while also calling on all parties to de-escalate rhetoric and reduce conflict. 首次袭击发生后，奥特曼在社交平台 X 上发文，并附上了孩子和男友的照片。他写道，「对 AI 的恐惧和焦虑是有道理的，我们正在见证人类社会有史以来最大规模的变革」，同时呼吁各方缓和言辞、减少冲突。

🔗 Related reading: Altman's Mansion Attacked Twice in 48 Hours, Anti-AI Fury Spreads Globally 🔗 相关阅读： 奥特曼豪宅 48 小时遇袭两次，反 AI 怒火烧向全球

item.title: 曝 Meta 做「赛博小扎」与员工沟通
item.guid: 曝-Meta-做「赛博小扎」与员工沟通
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, Meta is developing a realistic 3D digital AI avatar for its CEO Mark Zuckerberg to interact and communicate with internal employees on his behalf. 据《金融时报》报道，Meta 正为其 CEO 马克·扎克伯格开发一款逼真的 3D 数字 AI 分身，以代替其与内部员工进行交互沟通。

The project is led by Meta's newly established Superintelligence Labs division and is currently in its early stages. According to informed sources, the AI character is undergoing intensive training based on Zuckerberg's voice, tone, mannerisms, public statements, and recent corporate strategic visions. 该项目由 Meta 新成立的 Superintelligence Labs 部门主导，目前仍处于早期阶段。据知情人士透露，该 AI 角色正基于扎克伯格的语音、语调、行为举止、公开声明以及近期的企业战略构想进行密集训练。

Zuckerberg himself is highly involved in this project, spending 5 to 10 hours each week personally writing code and participating in technical reviews and model testing. 扎克伯格本人对此项目高度介入，每周花费 5 至 10 小时亲自编写代码并参与技术审查与模型测试。

The core purpose of developing this AI avatar is to enable real-time conversations with employees and provide business feedback, aiming to 'scale' executive communication reach within the vast corporate structure. 研发该 AI 分身的核心目的在于实现与员工的实时对话并提供业务反馈，以期在庞大的企业架构中「规模化」高管的沟通触达率。

It should be noted that this system differs from the previously revealed 'CEO Agent' project, which is primarily used to assist Zuckerberg with personal administrative tasks such as rapid information retrieval. 需要注意的是，该系统与早前曝光的「CEO 代理（CEO Agent）」计划存在差异，后者主要用于协助扎克伯格处理快速信息检索等个人行政工作。

item.title: 人形机器人「上岗」景区，智元远征 A3 首批商用交付完成
item.guid: 人形机器人「上岗」景区，智元远征-A3-首批商用交付完成
item.description:
Zhiyuan Robotics recently held the first batch delivery ceremony for Expedition A3 in Qidong, Jiangsu, officially shipping this full-size humanoid robot in bulk to commercial clients. 智元机器人近日在江苏启东举行远征 A3 首批交付仪式，正式将这款全尺寸人形机器人批量发往商业客户。

At the delivery ceremony, Wang Chuang, partner and senior vice president of Zhiyuan Robotics, delivered the first batch of commercial machines to two clients, Qihong Culture & Tourism and Xiuka Technology. On-site, Expedition A3 completed multiple dance routine demonstrations. The first batch of robots will be deployed in key scenic areas and cultural venues in Qidong, undertaking tasks such as intelligent guidance, immersive performances, and smart operations. 在交付仪式上，智元机器人合伙人、高级副总裁王闯将首批商用机交付给启泓文旅和秀卡科技两家客户。现场，远征 A3 完成了多套舞蹈动作展示。首批机器人将部署于启东重点景区及文博场馆，承担智能导览、沉浸式演艺和智慧运营等任务。

Expedition A3 is a new generation full-size humanoid robot launched by Zhiyuan this year. It stands 173cm tall, weighs 55kg, is equipped with 12kW instantaneous power, has a thrust-to-weight ratio of 0.218kW/kg, supports high-difficulty actions such as aerial kicks, continuous flying kicks, and air walking, and can achieve 10 hours of battery life and 10-second quick battery swap. 远征 A3 是智元今年推出的新一代全尺寸人形机器人，机身高 173cm、重 55kg，搭载 12kW 瞬间功率，推重比达 0.218kW/kg，支持凌空飞踹、连续飞踢、空中漫步等高难度动作，可实现 10 小时续航与 10 秒快速换电。

According to Wang Chuang, in the first half of the year, Expedition A3 will focus on entertainment performance scenarios, positioned as "a silicon-based star born for the stage"; in the second half, the A3 Ultra will be launched, primarily targeting 24-hour deployment applications. Currently, all existing orders for Expedition A3 are locked, and production capacity is in short supply for the first half of the year. 据王闯透露，上半年远征 A3 将聚焦文娱表演场景，定位「为舞台而生的硅基明星」；下半年将推出主攻 24 小时部署态应用的 A3 Ultra。目前，远征 A3 现有订单已全部锁定，上半年产能供不应求。

item.title: 金山办公一季度净利预增超 4 倍
item.guid: 金山办公一季度净利预增超-4-倍
item.description:
Last night, Kingsoft Office disclosed its Q1 2026 performance forecast, with both revenue and profit exceeding expectations, and net profit growth being particularly striking. 昨晚，金山办公披露 2026 年一季度业绩预告，营收与利润双双超预期，其中净利润增幅尤为亮眼。

It is estimated that in the first quarter of this year, operating revenue will reach 1.565 billion to 1.662 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 20.24% to 27.68%; net profit attributable to the parent company is expected to reach 2.022 billion to 2.307 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 401.89% to 472.81%, directly more than quadrupling; non-recurring net profit is expected to be 1.999 billion to 2.282 billion yuan, also more than quadrupling year-on-year.

However, the main driving force behind this "surge" comes from the concentrated release of investment income, rather than the explosive growth of the main business. Kingsoft Office stated in its announcement that during the reporting period, some external investment fund projects generated significant investment income, contributing significantly to net profit growth. 不过，这一「暴增」背后的主要驱动力来自投资收益的集中释放，而非主营业务的爆发。金山办公在公告中说明，报告期内部分对外投资基金项目产生了较大额度的投资收益，对净利润增长贡献显著。

Excluding the impact of this investment income, the company's net profit attributable to the parent company is approximately 487 million to 544 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 20.99% to 35.15%; non-recurring net profit is approximately 465 million to 519 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 19.19% to 33.14%. The main business's profitability continues to maintain a steady growth trend. 剔除该投资收益影响后，公司归母净利润约为 4.87 亿元至 5.44 亿元，同比增长 20.99% 至 35.15%；扣非净利润约为 4.65 亿元至 5.19 亿元，同比增长 19.19% 至 33.14%。主业盈利能力依然保持稳健增长态势。

item.title: 💡 微软高管：AI 智能体将像员工一样购买软件许可证
item.guid: 💡-微软高管：AI-智能体将像员工一样购买软件许可证
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Microsoft Executive Vice President Rajesh Jha recently suggested at an industry conference that in the future, when enterprises widely deploy AI agents, these agents may need to purchase software licenses just like employees. 据《商业内幕》报道，微软执行副总裁 Rajesh Jha 近日在一场行业会议上提出，未来企业大规模部署 AI 智能体后，这些智能体或许需要像员工一样购买软件许可证。

Jha believes that when the number of AI agents in an organization exceeds human employees, each agent will become an independent "user" requiring its own identity, login account, and even software seat. Jha 认为，当组织中 AI 智能体的数量超过人类员工时，每个智能体都将成为一个独立的「用户」，需要拥有自己的身份标识、登录账号乃至软件席位。

Each of these AI agents, with independent identities in the system, is a potential paid seat.

For example, in a company with 20 employees, if each employee is equipped with 5 AI agents, and the number of employees is reduced to 10, the company may still need to purchase 50 paid seats. 以一家拥有 20 名员工的公司为例，若每位员工配备 5 个 AI 智能体，同时员工人数缩减至 10 人，企业仍可能需要购买 50 个付费席位。

However, not everyone agrees with this logic. Nenad Milicevic, a partner at consulting firm AlixPartners, believes that AI agents will reduce the number of humans directly interacting with software, thereby significantly compressing license demand. 然而，并非所有人都认同这一逻辑。咨询公司 AlixPartners 合伙人 Nenad Milicevic 认为，AI 智能体将减少与软件直接交互的人类数量，从而大幅压缩许可证需求。

Work that originally required 20 employees might only need one person supervising a few agents in the future, which would significantly reduce software vendors' bargaining power. 原本需要 20 名员工的工作，未来可能只需一人监管少数几个智能体即可完成，这将使软件厂商的议价能力显著下降。

Milicevic also pointed out that the real winners will be open platforms. If vendors forcefully charge extra for machine access, it might push customers towards competitors that allow AI agents to run freely. Milicevic 还指出，真正的赢家将是开放平台。若厂商强行对机器访问额外收费，反而可能将客户推向那些允许 AI 智能体自由运行的竞争对手。

item.title: 华为 Pura X Max 外观曝光
item.guid: 华为-Pura-X-Max-外观曝光
item.description:
Yesterday, Huawei officially unveiled the appearance of its first large-foldable Huawei Pura X Max. The new device will be officially released on April 20th. 昨天，华为正式公布了其首款大阔折华为 Pura X Max 的外观，新机将于 4 月 20 日正式发布。

The new phone will offer three main color options: purple, white, and orange; the back cover adopts a segmented texture design similar to the Pura X; from the leaked information, the new phone's back cover may be made of glass. 新机将提供三款主打配色，包含紫、白、橙；同时后盖采用了类似 Pura X 的分割纹理设计；从曝光信息来看，新机后盖或为玻璃材质。

The new phone features a straight-edge frame design. The camera module is larger than that of the Pura X and has switched to a triple-camera setup. However, the Pura X Max is still expected to use a triple-focal length lens plus a red maple primary color lens. 新机中框采用直边设计， 摄像头模组相较于 Pura X 更大，同时切换为三摄模样。但本次 Pura X Max 预计依然采用三焦段镜头+红枫原色镜头。

In addition, Richard Yu, Chairman of Huawei Terminal BG, posted his first video on his Xiaohongshu account yesterday, revealing the inner and outer screens of the new foldable Pura X Max. 此外，华为终端 BG 董事长余承东昨天在其小红书账号发布了首条视频，并曝光了新款阔折叠 Pura X Max 的内外屏。

From the leaked video, the overall size of the Huawei Pura X Max has increased, and the outer screen has changed from the previous square small screen to a centered punch-hole full screen; for the inner screen, the new phone adopts a horizontal usage ratio, and the camera has changed from a vertical centered punch-hole to a horizontal upper-right punch-hole, emphasizing horizontal use. 从曝光的视频来看，华为 Pura X Max 的整机尺寸有所增长，同时外屏从前代的方块小屏，变为居中打孔全面屏；内屏方面，新机采用了横向使用的比例，摄像头从竖向居中打孔变为了横向右上打孔，主打横向使用。

Products released concurrently also include Huawei AI Glasses, which will be available in Streamer Silver, Titanium Gray, and Modern Black, focusing on lightweight design; they support photo taking, video recording, audio playback, simultaneous interpretation, as well as AI object recognition, real-time information broadcasting, and voice interaction functions. 一同发布的产品还包括华为 AI 眼镜，将提供流光银、钛银灰、摩登黑三款配色，主打轻量化设计；支持拍照、视频录制、音频播放及同声传译，以及 AI 识物、实时信息播报、语音交互等功能。

item.title: 刘作虎发文解读 OPPO Find X9 Ultra 设计理念，4 月 21 日正式发布
item.guid: 刘作虎发文解读-OPPO-Find-X9-Ultra-设计理念，4-月-21-日正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, OPPO Chief Product Officer Liu Zuohu posted on Weibo, elaborating on the design philosophy of the upcoming imaging flagship Find X9 Ultra. He stated that the Find X9 Ultra's exterior design does not start from "good looks" but from "good photography," aiming to "make every line responsible for imaging." 昨天，OPPO 首席产品官刘作虎在微博发文，阐述了即将发布的影像旗舰 Find X9 Ultra 的设计理念。他表示，Find X9 Ultra 的外观设计不是从「好看」出发，而是从「拍得好」出发，「让每一道线条，都为影像负责」。

In terms of design language, Liu Zuohu emphasized that the iconic circular imaging module is not merely decorative, but rather the physical starting point of the entire imaging system. Its proportions, curvature, and texture all grow around the optical structure, with form completely subservient to function. 在设计语言上，刘作虎强调，那枚标志性的圆形影像模组并非装饰，而是整套影像系统的物理起点，其比例、弧度与纹理均围绕光学结构生长，形式彻底服从于功能。

The cool feel of metal, restrained lines, rigorous order, and the iconic Hasselblad orange embellishment collectively form the professional temperament of this device. He defines this splash of orange as a "signal" – a signal to pick up the phone and prepare to create. 金属材质的冷静感、克制的线条、严谨的秩序，以及标志性的哈苏橙色点缀，共同构成了这台设备的专业气质。他将这抹橙色定义为「信号」——是拿起手机、准备开始创作的信号。

In terms of imaging specifications, the Find X9 Ultra is equipped with a Hasselblad dual 200-megapixel ultra-clear imaging system, a second-generation Danxia color reproduction lens, a new generation Hasselblad Master Mode, LUMO Condensing Light imaging system, and 8K ultra-clear cinematic video. Previously leaked information also indicated that its main camera specification is 200 megapixels f/1.5, and it is equipped with a 50-megapixel 10X periscope super telephoto lens. 影像规格方面，Find X9 Ultra 搭载哈苏双 2 亿超清影像系统、第二代丹霞色彩还原镜头、新一代哈苏大师模式、LUMO 凝光影像系统及 8K 超清电影级视频，此前曝光信息还显示其主摄规格为 2 亿像素 f/1.5，并配备 5000 万像素 10X 潜望超长焦。

It is worth noting that after this Weibo post was detected by Tencent Hunyuan AI detection tool, the AI feature accounted for 49.2%, suspected AI features accounted for 50.8%, and human features were 0%. 值得注意的是，这条微博经腾讯混元 AI 检测工具检测后，AI 特征占比达 49.2%，疑似 AI 特征占比 50.8%，人工特征为 0%。

The OPPO × Hasselblad Imaging New Product Joint Launch Event will be held in Chengdu on April 21st at 19:00, where two new flagship phones, the Find X9 Ultra and Find X9s Pro, will be unveiled. OPPO × 哈苏影像新品联合发布会将于 4 月 21 日晚 19:00 在成都举办，届时将带来 Find X9 Ultra 与 Find X9s Pro 两款旗舰新机。

item.title: 追觅手机 AURORA LUX 真机曝光
item.guid: 追觅手机-AURORA-LUX-真机曝光
item.description:
Yesterday, Yu Hao, CEO of Dreame Technology, posted real photos of the Dreame AURORA LUX phone on Weibo. 昨天，追觅科技 CEO 俞浩在微博晒出追觅手机 AURORA LUX 的真机照片。

It is reported that AURORA LUX is positioned as a high-end luxury series, co-created by Dreame and Nubia. It features a 2688×1216 resolution full-screen display without a punch-hole, built-in Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 Ultimate mobile platform, and pre-installed Nebula AIOS system based on Android 16. 据悉，AURORA LUX 定位高奢系列，由追觅与努比亚合作打造，正面搭载一块 2688×1216 分辨率无挖孔全面屏，内置高通第五代骁龙 8 至尊版移动平台，预装基于安卓 16 的星云 AIOS 系统。

Regarding pricing, it will depend on the user's choice of gold weight, diamond material, and leather. 售价方面，将根据用户所选的黄金克重、钻石材质及皮革用料而定。

In addition to AURORA LUX, Dreame also launched the AURORA NEX technology series, featuring an external modular lens design, expected to be released in the second half of this year. 除 AURORA LUX 外，追觅还推出了 AURORA NEX 科技系列，采用外挂式模块化镜头设计，预计于今年下半年上市。

item.title: 6806 美元起，宇树 R1 人形机器人开启全球预购
item.guid: 6806-美元起，宇树-R1-人形机器人开启全球预购
item.description:
According to The Humanoid Hub and Forbes, Unitree Technology's R1 series humanoid robots officially opened for global pre-orders yesterday, covering North American, European, Japanese, Singaporean, and Chinese markets, with official direct stores launching simultaneously. 据 The Humanoid Hub 及 Forbes 报道，宇树科技旗下 R1 系列人形机器人昨天正式开放全球预购，覆盖北美、欧洲、日本、新加坡及中国市场，官方直营店同步上线。

The R1 series comes in three models. The entry-level R1 AIR starts at $6,806 on AliExpress, the standard R1 is priced at $8,126, and the flagship R1 EDU's pricing has not yet been announced and requires contacting sales for inquiries. AliExpress channels are expected to start shipping from June 30th, while official direct stores state shipping will begin in May. R1 系列共分三款。入门版 R1 AIR 在 AliExpress 的起售价为 6,806 美元，标准版 R1 售价 8,126 美元，旗舰版 R1 EDU 定价尚未公布，需联系销售询价。AliExpress 渠道预计 6 月 30 日起开始发货，官方直营店则表示 5 月起发货。

    Height 123 cm, weight approximately 29 kg;

    Equipped with multi-modal voice and visual AI models, supporting Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity;

    Battery life approximately 1 hour, supports hot-swapping;

    R1 AIR is equipped with 20 degrees of freedom, while R1 and R1 EDU are upgraded to 26, adding degrees of movement for the waist and head.

It is worth noting that both R1 AIR and R1 standard versions do not support secondary development, with functions limited to preset actions and manual control; R1 EDU is the only model in the series that allows custom software installation and full SDK access, targeting developers and educational institutions. 值得注意的是，R1 AIR 与 R1 标准版均不支持二次开发，功能限定在预设动作与手动控制范围内；R1 EDU 是系列中唯一开放自定义软件安装与完整 SDK 访问权限的型号，面向开发者与教育机构。

For optional accessories, users can purchase the Unitree Dex3-1 robotic hand (version without tactile sensors priced at $6500) and NVIDIA Jetson Orin computing module to expand the robot's perception and computing capabilities. 可选配件方面，用户可选购宇树 Dex3-1 机械手（不含触觉传感器版本售价 6500 美元）及英伟达 Jetson Orin 计算模块，以扩展机器人的感知与运算能力。

item.title: 荣耀发布自研龙虾 AI 智能体 YOYO Claw 技术
item.guid: 荣耀发布自研龙虾-AI-智能体-YOYO-Claw-技术
item.description:
On April 13th, Honor held a technical communication meeting in Xi'an, launching the terminal-side "Lobster" AI agent – YOYO Claw, and announced that this technology will first be featured on the Honor MagicBook series of thin and light laptops, creating an entirely new category of "Shrimp-raising Laptops". 4 月 13 日，荣耀于西安举办技术沟通会，首发终端侧「龙虾」AI 智能体——YOYO Claw，并宣布该技术将首发搭载于荣耀 MagicBook 系列轻薄本，开创「养虾本」全新品类。

The upcoming "Shrimp-raising Laptops" will simultaneously address three major pain points commonly found in the use of "Lobster-style" AI agents: "complex deployment and getting started, high usage costs, and privacy security risks": 即将首发的「养虾本」一次性解决「龙虾式」AI 智能体使用中普遍存在的「部署及上手复杂、使用成本高、隐私安全风险」等三大痛点：

    "Ready to use out of the box," pre-installed with 5 main "shrimps" and 23 sub-"shrimps" at the factory, callable via WeChat and Feishu by scanning a QR code; saving money at the source, simple tasks completed on the device side, with zero token consumption;

    Device-level security, with independent security monitoring high-risk operations throughout, and sensitive operations requiring secondary confirmation;

    It also supports multi-terminal integration and "one shrimp, multiple uses," allowing the whole family to share the AI capabilities of one PC.

item.title: 智元发布零代码机器人部署平台 Genie Studio Agent
item.guid: 智元发布零代码机器人部署平台-Genie-Studio-Agent
item.description:
Zhiyuan officially released its zero-code application platform, Genie Studio Agent, yesterday, targeting embodied operation scenarios. It is positioned as a full-lifecycle software infrastructure for robots, covering core capabilities such as VLA models, reinforcement learning, visual perception, motion control, and navigation planning. 智元昨天正式发布面向具身作业场景的零代码应用平台 Genie Studio Agent，定位为机器人全生命周期软件基础设施，覆盖 VLA 模型、强化学习、视觉感知、运动控制、导航规划等核心能力。

Zhiyuan stated that Genie Studio Agent will gradually open up to system integrators and innovative enterprises, supporting secondary development and system integration, and promoting embodied intelligence from "single project delivery" to an "open platform ecosystem." 智元表示，Genie Studio Agent 将逐步向系统集成商及创新企业开放，支持二次开发与系统集成，推动具身智能从「单一项目交付」迈向「开放平台生态」。

item.title: 京东 x 深蓝推出 L06 增程版
item.guid: 京东-x-深蓝推出-L06-增程版
item.description:
Yesterday, JD.com announced a deep collaboration with Deepal Auto, jointly launching the Deepal L06 EREV. JD.com will provide exclusive sales and digital car purchase services for this model. 昨日，京东宣布与深蓝汽车达成深度合作，联合推出深蓝 L06 增程版，京东将提供该车型的独家销售及数字化购车服务。

The Deepal L06 EREV is positioned as an intelligent extended-range coupe, highlighting five major selling points: "aesthetics, handling, computing power, intelligent driving, and range." In terms of appearance, the new car features a coupe design, equipped with blooming petal headlights, dual-strip floating taillights, frameless doors, and frameless exterior rearview mirrors, with a fastback body paired with an electric automatic rear spoiler. 深蓝 L06 增程版定位智能增程轿跑，主打「颜值、操控、算力、智驾、续航」五大卖点。外观上，新车采用轿跑造型，配备绽放花瓣大灯、双灯带悬浮尾灯、无框车门及无边框外后视镜，溜背车身搭配电动自动尾翼。

    Equipped with a 175kW power motor, achieving 0-100 km/h acceleration in 7.2s;

    Features magnetorheological suspension, with high-frequency adjustment thousands of times per second; wheelbase of 2900mm, trunk volume of 431L;

    CLTC pure electric range of 245km, comprehensive range up to 1505km, and fuel consumption as low as 3.46L/100km when battery is low;

    All models are equipped with CATL battery cells, supporting 3C supercharging, with 30% to 80% charge in just 15 minutes;

    Equipped with a 3nm automotive-grade cockpit chip, a 2.5K sunflower rotating central control screen, and a 50-inch AR-HUD. It also features the Deepal DEEPAL AD Max system, standard with lidar and 26 sets of sensors, utilizing dual Journey 6M chips for a total computing power of 256 TOPS.

JD.com's "National Good Car 2.0" offers two options: open store test drives and in-depth home test drives in some areas. Delivery is supported by both Deepal 4S stores and JD.com's National Good Car Delivery Centers. 京东「国民好车 2.0」提供开放门店试驾和部分地区上门深度试驾两种选择，交付支持深蓝 4S 店及京东国民好车交付中心两种方式。

item.title: 《王者荣耀世界》移动端定档本周五
item.guid: 《王者荣耀世界》移动端定档本周五
item.description:
"Honor of Kings: World" was officially announced yesterday, with the mobile version launching on April 17th. Previously, the PC version of the game had already opened its servers on April 10th, supporting multi-platform progress synchronization, allowing players to seamlessly transfer game progress across devices. 《王者荣耀世界》昨日正式官宣，移动端将于 4 月 17 日上线。此前，游戏 PC 端已于 4 月 10 日率先开服，并支持多端进度互通，玩家可跨设备无缝衔接游戏进度。

Pre-download for the mobile version will begin at 8 AM on April 15th. The Android resource package is approximately 9 GB, and it is recommended to reserve over 13 GB of storage space; iOS does not currently support pre-download and will be launched simultaneously on April 17th, the day of the open beta. 移动端预下载将于 4 月 15 日上午 8 点开启。其中安卓端资源包约 9 GB，建议预留 13 GB 以上存储空间；iOS 端暂不支持预下载，将于 4 月 17 日公测当天同步上线。

The game is developed using the Unreal Engine, where players will explore the King's Continent as "Children of the Origin Flow," supporting diverse exploration gameplay such as grappling hook climbing, swimming and diving, and terrain interaction. The combat system is centered around "Flow" energy, with an initial lineup of 11 heroes, including the original character "Leng Chun." 游戏采用虚幻引擎研发，玩家将以「元流之子」身份探索王者大陆，支持钩索攀爬、游泳潜水、地形互动等多样化探索玩法。战斗系统以「流」能量为核心，首发阵容共 11 名英雄，包含原创角色「冷春」。

item.title: 网信办发布 11 条直播打赏新规，8 岁以下未成年人全面禁止打赏
item.guid: 网信办发布-11-条直播打赏新规，8-岁以下未成年人全面禁止打赏
item.description:
According to the "Wangxin China" official WeChat account, the Secretariat of the Cyberspace Administration of China recently officially issued the "Notice on Strengthening the Standardized Management of Online Live Streaming Rewards," proposing 11 specific management requirements covering various dimensions such as disclosure of reward rules, protection of minors, and identification of abnormal behavior. 据「网信中国」公众号，中央网信办秘书局日前正式印发《关于加强网络直播打赏规范管理的通知》，共提出 11 条具体管理要求，涵盖打赏规则公示、未成年人保护、异常行为识别等多个维度。

    No rewards for those under 8 years old; 8-16 years old require guardian consent; over 16 years old require guardian consent or proof of income; suspected minors using adult accounts for rewards must be verified and immediately dealt with;

    First-time rewarders must be proactively offered a limit setting service; the reward reminder function is enabled by default; user consumption data may not be disclosed without user consent;

    Users must not be enticed through methods such as reward cashbacks or self-rewarding; special protection permissions must not be set for rewarding users; streamers or users must not be ranked solely based on reward amounts;

    Accounts with violation records may only enable reward permissions after a 3-month disposition period; reward permissions will be suspended concurrently during a mute period, with the suspension duration being 2-3 times the mute period;

    Platforms must establish a negative list for reward-based profit-making behaviors, retain reward records, regularly expose typical violation cases, and improve the complaint and reporting mechanism.

item.title: 中国网络文学 IP 改编市场规模突破 3676 亿元，同比增长超 23%
item.guid: 中国网络文学-IP-改编市场规模突破-3676-亿元，同比增长超-23%
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences yesterday released the "2025 China Online Literature Development Research Report". The report shows that as of the end of last year, the scale of China's online literature reading market reached 50.21 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 16.6%; the market scale for online literature IP adaptations reached 367.61 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 23.13%. 据新华社报道，中国社会科学院昨日发布《2025 中国网络文学发展研究报告》。报告显示，截至去年底，中国网络文学阅读市场规模达 502.1 亿元，同比增长 16.6%；网络文学 IP 改编市场规模达 3676.1 亿元，同比增长 23.13%。

The report also specifically mentioned that online literature has shown innovative characteristics in aspects such as deep integration with culture and tourism, and empowerment by AI technology, becoming a foundational force for China's cultural "new three" going global in the internet era. 报告还特别提及，网络文学在文旅深度融合、AI 技术赋能等方面展现出创新特质，已成为网络时代中国文化出海「新三样」的基础性力量。

item.title: 《曼达洛人与古古》确认引进
item.guid: 《曼达洛人与古古》确认引进
item.description:
According to China Movie Report, Disney's "Star Wars" sci-fi film "The Mandalorian & Grogu" has been confirmed for import. The film's North American release date is set for May 22, with the specific domestic release date yet to be announced. 据中国电影报道消息，迪士尼「星战」系列科幻电影《曼达洛人与古古》确认引进，本片北美上映日期定为 5 月 22 日，国内具体档期尚待公布。

The film is created by the original team of the popular Disney+ series "The Mandalorian" and directed by Jon Favreau. Pedro Pascal returns to play the protagonist Mando, "Baby Yoda" Grogu also returns to "play himself", Sigourney Weaver joins the cast, and Jeremy Allen White voices Jabba's son Rotta. 影片由 Disney+ 热门剧集《曼达洛人》原班人马打造，乔恩·费儒执导。佩德罗·帕斯卡回归出演主角 Mando，「尤达宝宝」古古同样回归「饰演自己」，西格妮·韦弗加盟出演，杰瑞米·艾伦·怀特为贾巴之子 Rotta 配音。

item.title: 《镖人：风起大漠》票房破 14 亿后再延期
item.guid: 《镖人：风起大漠》票房破-14-亿后再延期
item.description:
The film "Blade of the Phantom Master: Wind from the Desert" officially announced yesterday that its release key has been extended again, with the screening period prolonged until May 20. According to Maoyan Pro data, as of the announcement, the film's cumulative box office has exceeded 1.439 billion yuan. 电影《镖人：风起大漠》于昨日官宣密钥再度延期，上映时间延长至 5 月 20 日。据猫眼专业版数据，截至公告发布时，该片累计票房已突破 14.39 亿元。

Previously, the filmmakers announced on March 14 that all versions would be extended until April 16. Now, with another extension, the screening period is further stretched to over three months. 此前，片方曾于 3 月 14 日宣布全版本延长放映至 4 月 16 日，如今再度续期，映期进一步拉长至逾三个月。

"Blade of the Phantom Master: Wind from the Desert" was released during this year's Spring Festival holiday. Directed by "the world's number one martial arts choreographer" Yuen Woo-ping, starring Wu Jing, Nicholas Tse, and Yu Shi, it is adapted from the highly-rated domestic comic "Blade of the Phantom Master". The story is set in the third year of Daye during the late Sui Dynasty, telling the jianghu tale of swordsman Dao Ma escorting Zhi Shilang to Chang'an and encountering multiple ambushes along the way. 《镖人：风起大漠》于今年春节档上映，由「天下第一武指」袁和平执导，吴京、谢霆锋、于适领衔主演，改编自高分国产漫画《镖人》，故事背景设定于隋末大业三年，讲述镖客刀马护送知世郎前往长安、途中遭遇多方围剿的江湖故事。

item.title: 贾樟柯新短片《都灵之影》杀青
item.guid: 贾樟柯新短片《都灵之影》杀青
item.description:
According to Sina Film, Jia Zhangke's directed short film "Torino Shadow" has completed filming, and stills and behind-the-scenes photos have been released. 据新浪电影，贾樟柯执导的电影短片《都灵之影》（TORINO SHADOW）已完成拍摄，并公布了剧照及工作照。

The film tells the story of a woman who, on her way from Guangdong to Turin to visit her husband, unexpectedly rediscovers herself and simultaneously discovers the story of cinema. It is reported that a classic song by the band Wutiaoren is also used in the film. 影片讲述一位女性在从广东前往都灵探望丈夫的途中，意外找回自我、同时发现电影的故事。据悉，片中还使用了五条人乐队的一首经典歌曲。
